reviews.comment:
Se les derramo la nafta

Solo tenia que cargar un cuarto de tanque y termino cargando y 28 litros... me dijo q solo se habian derramado 3 litros. Y era una catarata. Una falta de respeto  y me descontaron $ 400 ... osea cualquiera..
Poco personal...

(Translated by Google)
They spilled the gas.

I only needed to fill a quarter of the tank, and they ended up filling it with 28 liters... they told me only 3 liters had spilled. It was like a waterfall. It was disrespectful, and they charged me $400... unbelievable. Very unprofessional.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5Z0tyY0lREAE
